category_sources: source_facts.description identifies ProFTPD as highly configurable FTP server software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ProFTPD site.
source_facts.repo uses the official proftpd/proftpd repository name.
docs_sources: Official ProFTPD site hosts the dedicated /docs/ documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/proftpd/proftpd, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ProFTPD server and FTP administration utilities.
